rules: Every prompt declares template_routes and resolves them before artifact production.
Every registered template is owned by at least one prompt route.
Required sections may not be removed; use Not Applicable with evidence when legitimate.
No silent template substitution, flattening, or omission.
Template outputs inherit prompt evidence, authority, privacy, accessibility, review, and verification contracts.
Backlinks, forward links, parent hubs, prerequisites, next steps, and related references are required for multipage documentation.
Template conformance is checked before completion and recorded in the run manifest.
anti_bloat: Conditional templates must not be loaded merely because they are compatible; activation needs a requested artifact, audience, platform, or lifecycle trigger.
